# Environment Variables Template
#
# Copy this file to .env and fill in the values.
# Never commit .env to version control.
#
# Generated by AIOS Factory for: {{VERTICAL_NAME}}

# ─── AI Service ──────────────────────────────────────────────
# At least one AI service key is required for skills to function.

# Anthropic Claude API (recommended)
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=

# OpenAI API (alternative)
# OPENAI_API_KEY=

# ─── Communication ───────────────────────────────────────────
# For Slack integration (optional)

# SLACK_BOT_TOKEN=xoxb-your-token
# SLACK_TEAM_ID=T0000000000

# ─── Project Management ─────────────────────────────────────
# For Notion integration (optional)

# NOTION_TOKEN=secret_your-token

# ─── Calendar ────────────────────────────────────────────────
# For Google Calendar integration (optional)

# GOOGLE_CREDENTIALS=path/to/credentials.json

# ─── Vertical-Specific ──────────────────────────────────────
# Add industry-specific API keys below as needed.

{{VERTICAL_SPECIFIC_VARS}}
